subparts.text: Define Gross Domestic Product and National Income.
Explain the components of aggregate demand in the simple Keynesian model.
What are the properties of the IS and LM curves?

questions.question_text: Explain the Classical theory of income and employment. What are its major assumptions?
How do fiscal and monetary policies affect the classical model of the economy?
How is equilibrium income determined in the Keynesian framework? What happens when aggregate demand changes?
Define and differentiate between investment multiplier, government expenditure multiplier, and tax multiplier.
How equilibrium income and interest rate is determined using the IS- LM model?
Explain the derivation and properties of the Keynesian aggregate demand curve.
What are the key instruments of monetary control used by central banks? How do they influence money supply?
Define the Balance of Payments account. How do monetary and fiscal policies affect the exchange rate in an open economy?
